title: Citizens Financial Unit Investigated for Sales of Savings Product Controlled by Troubled Financier Greg Lindberg
text: Massachusetts securities regulators confirmed they are examining sales of annuities offered by Colorado Bankers Life Insurance.

title: Citizens, LISC Team up to Help Workers Build Digital Skills That Open Doors to Strong Jobs, Economic Opportunity
text: NEW YORK & PROVIDENCE, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Citizens Charitable Foundation announced today a $1.25 million grant to the Local Initiatives Support Corporation (LISC) to fuel digital inclusion in historically marginalized communities, helping residents build the skills they need to compete for jobs. “Citizens is committed to helping our communities thrive, and equitable access to digital literacy is key to economic vitality,” said Bruce Van Saun, Chairman and CEO, Citizens Financial Group.

title: Want Diversified Exposure in the Regional Banks? Try These ETFs
text: The Silicon Valley Bank implosion created a domino effect, with regional bank stocks selling off to levels not seen in years. The key word here is contagion and the fear of it.

title: These Bank Stocks Hit Lows—Some Even All-Time Lows—This Month
text: National giants like Bank of America and Wells Fargo sank to their lowest share price in over two years Friday.

title: Citizens Financial (CFG) Plans to bid for SVB's Private Bank
text: Citizens Financial (CFG) intends to bid for the acquisition of fallen SVB's private banking business.

title: Citizens Financial prepping bid for Silicon Valley Bank's private banking segment, report says
text: Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) Inc is preparing a bid to acquire the private banking arm of the collapsed Silicon Valley bank, according to a report from Reuters.  The Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) has set a deadline for Friday for bid offers to buy SVB Private and the large regional bank is among those expected to throw their hat in the ring, according to sources familiar with the matter.

title: Exclusive: Citizens Financial eyes bid for SVB's private bank - sources
text: Citizens Financial Group Inc is working on a bid to acquire the private banking business of failed Silicon Valley Bank, two people familiar with the matter said on Thursday.

title: 14 Bank Stocks to Buy After the Recent Silicon Valley Bank Collapse
text: While the chaos is not necessarily over, many bank stocks look to have been indiscriminately sold off. Many banks have managed interest rate risk much better than Silicon Valley Bank.

title: Investors are flocking to these well capitalized regional banks after SVB's collapse, market analyst says
text: Despite fallout from SVB, investors have already began returning to bank stocks, and should seek out firms with strong deposit franchises.

title: Citizens Extends Branch Hours to Further Serve Customers and Communities
text: PROVIDENCE, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Given recent market developments, Citizens has seen higher than normal interest from prospective new customers over the past few days. In an effort to further support these potential new customers as they navigate ongoing market uncertainty, Citizens will temporarily extend hours at branches across its retail footprint, effective tomorrow, March 14.
